summary: Full frontend testing of Iteration 7 Pricing section. All 14 functional checks PASSED: navbar Precios scroll, default state (combo+monthly), Combo (4 cards) & Marketing (3 cards) rendering with correct prices, mode toggle re-render, frequency toggle math (monthly/quarterly/annual) with correct monthly equivalents, total payment, savings, badges ('Más elegido' on gold, 'Top tier' on combo_diamond_premium), 'Contrato mínimo 3 meses' on monthly, CTA opens Calendly with correct UTM params (utm_source=automatikmedia, utm_medium=pricing, utm_content=<plan_id>, utm_campaign=<freq_id>), CTA fires POST /api/events with correct payload (name=pricing_cta_click, variant=pricing, metadata={plan, frequency, mode}), disclaimer text present, regression sections render (combo, cómo funciona, resultados, calculadora, casos, testimonios), no console errors, mobile responsive (1-column stack for both modes, no horizontal overflow).

issues: combo_gold @ annual shows monthly equivalent '1,598' instead of spec-mentioned '~$1,597' due to Math.round(1597.6)=1598. This is a cosmetic 1$ rounding difference — the spec said '~$1,597' so it's within tolerance. If exact $1,597 is required, change rounding to Math.floor or use 2 decimals.

critical_code_review_comments: Pricing.jsx (437 lines): clean, well-structured. PLANS/FREQUENCIES catalog and tracking logic colocated — fine for size, no urgent split needed.
track() uses axios fire-and-forget with .catch(()=>{}) — appropriate; backend is non-critical for UX.
Annual monthly-equivalent rounding: Math.round(1597.6)=1598 instead of 1597. If brand wants exact $1,597 displayed, switch to Math.floor in fmtUSD or display 2-decimal monthly equivalent.
Calendly URL build uses template literals safely; plan.id and freq.id are controlled constants (no XSS risk).

All required data-testid present (pricing-section, pricing-title, pricing-mode-toggle, mode-marketing, mode-combo, pricing-frequency-toggle, freq-monthly, freq-quarterly, freq-annual, plan-card-<id>, plan-price-<id>, plan-cta-<id>).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pricing section fully verified. Math: monthly=base, quarterly multiplier=2 (pay 2 months get 3, monthly_eq=2/3 base, savings=base), annual multiplier=9.6 (12*0.8, savings=base*12*0.2). CTA wiring verified end-to-end with window.open patch and XHR interception of /api/events POST. Mobile 390px: combo (4) and marketing (3) cards stack to 1 column at default md breakpoint behavior.
